preferred_name: unit of measure for trip value

preferred_name_ml.en: unit of measure for trip value

definition: short name of the standardized engineering unit of the value of the input which triggers the forcing of an output to a set value

definition_ml.en: short name of the standardized engineering unit of the value of the input which triggers the forcing of an output to a set value
definition_ml.de: Kurzbezeichnung der standardisierten technischen Einheit, des Eingangs, der das Erzwingen eines Ausgangs auf einen eingestellten Wert auslöst

note:
NOTE 1: Units of measure are defined in IEC 62720.
NOTE 2: Refer to IEC CDD starting with the IRDI: 0112/2///62720#UBA000 - units of measurement.
NOTE 3: To support electronic data exchange through all languages, it is strongly recommended that ONLY English "Short names" are used.

note_ml.en:
NOTE 1: Units of measure are defined in IEC 62720.
NOTE 2: Refer to IEC CDD starting with the IRDI: 0112/2///62720#UBA000 - units of measurement.
NOTE 3: To support electronic data exchange through all languages, it is strongly recommended that ONLY English "Short names" are used.
note_ml.de:
ANMERKUNG 1: Maßeinheiten sind in IEC 62720 definiert.
ANMERKUNG 2: Siehe IEC CDD, beginnend mit der IRDI: 0112/2///62720#UBA000 - units of measurement.
ANMERKUNG 3: Um den elektronischen Datenaustausch in allen Sprachen zu unterstützen, wird dringend empfohlen, NUR die englische „Kurzbezeichnung“ zu verwenden.
